title: SACRAMENTO, CA —

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 1185 will enhance security assistance to nonprofits at risk of hate-motivated violence.",
    "The Nonprofit Security Grant Program (NSGP) will be broadened to ensure funding is directed to applicants most likely to be targeted by hate-motivated violence.",
    "The NSGP has become the most popular grant administered by the Governor’s Office of Emergency Services.",
    "AB 1185 will enhance and strengthen the NSGP by expanding eligibility to include applicants who provide vulnerability assessments for other at-risk nonprofits.",
    "Organizations that provide rapid response to shootings in Jewish neighborhoods will now be eligible for funding thanks to this legislation."
  ]
}
```
